case_title: MARIA C. GONZALEZ VS. FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,451.48 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARIA C. AS TO DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA C. GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KHALED S. DAJANI (PRESIDENT) AND ALEX AYALA (PROPERTY MANAGER). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PROOF OF SERVICE REQUIRED TO BE FILED 5 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION WAIVES SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALEX AYALA, PROPERTY MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED OCT-04-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2022 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF MARIA GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALEX AYALA PROPERTY MANAGER, AND KHALED DAJANI, PRESIDENT. AUTHORIZATIONS TO APPEAR FOR THE DEFENDANTS ARE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARIA C. FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIA C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION $1,728.39 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,843.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KHALED S. DAJANI, PRESIDENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT FULTON PARKVIEW OWNERS' ASSOCIATION
